author: y4rr
content: Multi-tap (K=2,4,8) + MagWeightedBCE shipped. Multi-tap negative: matched F1 0.679 but cos_sim worse than single-tap at every density (more SVD warmup cost > tap gain). Full-corpus capture OOM'd (5.7M K=4 trace exceeds 54 GB host). MagWeightedBCE matches single-tap pareto, preserves argmax better in t=-2 regime. New code: from_trace_paths_multitap (memory-streaming loader), temporal_split_owned (Vec::split_off avoids 3x), bce_with_logits_magnitude_weighted, TrainingObjective::MagWeightedBce, ShadowLlmConfig::internal toolingnt unchanged: pw=3 BCE t=-2.5 (57% MLP savings, argmax preserved, cos_sim 0.882). Real next lever is plainact criterion (backward pass).
